summary: Regression check after refactor (hook deps, stable keys, public_user helper). All previously broken issues are now fixed: /api/auth/register returns 200 with sanitized user (no _id/password), /api/ai/price-predict returns 200 with prediction text. All other endpoints continue to work. Frontend renders cleanly with zero React errors/warnings. Farmer login + dashboard with useCallback'd load works. Products filters update URL correctly. AI chat button no longer overlapped (visible above Emergent badge in screenshot).
passed: POST /api/auth/register -> 200, response excludes _id and password (public_user helper applied)
POST /api/auth/login farmer@kisanbaazar.in/farmer123 -> 200 with token + sanitized user
POST /api/auth/login buyer@kisanbaazar.in/buyer123 -> 200 with token + sanitized user
GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token returns farmer user
GET /api/products returns 14 products (12 seed + 2 test-created carryover)
POST /api/orders creates order (total=90, razorpay_order_id present) with correct schema (items[].title/qty/price, delivery_address)
POST /api/orders/{id}/pay -> 200 ok:true with mock payment_id (Razorpay MOCKED)
POST /api/ai/chat streams real Claude response (Namaste + Kharif crops content)
POST /api/ai/price-predict -> 200 returns full prediction string (PREVIOUSLY BROKEN, now fixed)
Home page renders without React errors
Products page filters: clicking [data-testid=cat-fruits] -> URL ?category=fruits; [data-testid=filter-organic] -> URL ?category=fruits&organic=true
Farmer dashboard shows Active Listings (14), Orders (3), Total Revenue (Rs.1,095), My Listings, Recent Orders — useCallback'd load works
Zero React pageerror events captured during navigation across Home, Products, Login, Dashboard
AI chat floating button visible at bottom-right and not overlapped by Emergent badge (per screenshot)
notes: Did not exhaustively re-run: full buyer checkout UI flow, Add-Product modal submission, AI chat send via UI, product detail qty buttons. Backend equivalents all pass. Razorpay payment remains MOCKED (pay_mock_*). Build was already 'Compiled successfully' with zero warnings per main agent.
